essential.name: Hiking boots
essential.why: Volcanic gravel is merciless on regular sneakers. Ankle support prevents injuries on the descent.

essential.name: Headlamp
essential.why: Sunrise climbs start in pitch dark around 2 AM. Phone flashlights drain batteries and leave your hands full.

essential.name: Warm layers (down + fleece)
essential.why: Summit temperature is near freezing even in August. Wind chill makes it feel colder.

essential.name: Rain jacket + pants
essential.why: Weather changes rapidly above 3,000m. Getting wet in cold wind is genuinely dangerous.

essential.name: Backpack (30L)
essential.why: Needs to fit water, food, layers, and rain gear. Hut requires you to carry your own stuff.

essential.name: Water (2L minimum)
essential.why: Altitude dehydrates you fast. Huts sell water at 3–5× Tokyo prices.

essential.name: Cash (¥15,000)
essential.why: Huts and toilets only accept cash. No ATMs above the 5th station.

essential.name: Gloves
essential.why: You'll grip cold ropes and metal chains at rocky sections.

optional.name: Trekking poles
optional.why: Saves knees on the descent. Not essential for fit climbers.

optional.name: Portable oxygen can
optional.why: Helpful if you're prone to altitude sickness. Not a substitute for proper acclimatization.

optional.name: Snacks & energy bars
optional.why: Huts serve basic meals but trail snacks keep you going.
